name: Chicken Piccata (Frugal Gourmet)
recipeInstructions:
Sauté the yellow onion, garlic, and green onions in olive oil until tender. Remove from pan and set aside.
Remove skins and bones from chicken breasts and pound flat.
Mix flour, salt, and pepper together in a bowl.
Dip chicken into flour mixture, lightly browning in butter for 2-3 minutes per side.
Add sautéed onions and garlic to the pan.
Over high heat, add sherry, lemon juice, and capers. This should thicken to create a gravy for the chicken.
